error_signature: error handler workflow never gets triggered
title: Error handler not triggered from manual execution
symptom: The error handler workflow does not activate when the primary workflow fails during manual execution. No error message is displayed.
not_this_if: Error handler workflow has a normal trigger
Error occurs in a scheduled execution
root_cause: The error trigger node in n8n is designed to capture errors from workflows that are executed in a non-manual context. When workflows are run manually, the error handling mechanism does not activate, leading to the error handler not being triggered.
fix_steps: Replace the manual trigger in the error handler workflow with a scheduler node.
Set the scheduler to run after a short delay (e.g., 5 seconds).
Run the primary workflow to trigger an error.
Check the executions of the error handler workflow to confirm it was triggered.
agent_instruction: Use a scheduler node instead of a manual trigger in the error handler workflow.
safety_notes: De-activate the error handler workflow after testing to prevent spamming.
